narrative: Middle East uncertainty and potential Strait of Hormuz reopening drive a crude recovery toward $95, lifting oil-linked CAD despite its G8 laggard status. EUR/USD firms to 1.1773 as hawkish ECB tone offsets the 175bp Fed-ECB carry disadvantage; gold higher +0.20%; equities -0.38%; DXY -0.14%; VIX 17.1. US Nonfarm Payrolls at 12:30 UTC is the primary directional catalyst for the 3.75% Fed rate path.
